name: Sam Orpol
headline: Platform Technologist | Analytics & Data Strategy Leader
tagline: 15+ years building data disciplines that drive business impact across tech, media, and platform-scale companies

about.title: About
about.summary: I help organizations unlock the full potential of data through strategic clarity, organizational readiness, and disciplined execution.
about.description:
My career has been defined by building analytics functions from zero across some of the world's largest media, technology, and platform companies. I specialize in translating complex data challenges into actionable business strategy, designing rigorous experimentation frameworks, and scaling teams to drive evidence-based decision-making at organizational scale.

Currently, I serve as Head of Data & Analytics at Ollset (pre-launch event-based social media platform) and as COO & Co-Founder at Apex Solutions (ML optimization platform for vending operators), with advisory responsibilities at NicklPass.

experience.title: Head of Data & Analytics
experience.description: Leading data strategy and analytics for pre-launch event-based social media platform. Defining data infrastructure, analytics roadmap, and organizational readiness for growth-stage company.

experience.title: COO & Co-Founder
experience.description: Co-founding ML optimization platform for vending operators. Building go-to-market strategy, organizational structure, and data-driven decision-making framework for early-stage startup.
highlights: Built machine learning algorithms for vending optimization

experience.title: Head of Data & Analytics (Advisory)
experience.description: Strategic advisory on data architecture and analytics organization scaling.

experience.title: Senior Vice President, Analytics
experience.description: Built analytics organization from zero at Fortune 500 consulting firm. Designed analytics strategy, implemented experimentation programs, and scaled team managing analytics across 6,000+ employee firm.
highlights: Established formal A/B testing and causal inference capabilities
Scaled analytics team from 0 to 12+ full-time analysts
Created analytics tools and dashboards serving 200+ stakeholders

experience.title: VP, Data & Analytics
experience.description: Led data strategy for video technology company with 200M+ monthly active users. Managed analytics organization, experimentation platform, and product analytics across platform.
highlights: Designed and implemented company-wide experimentation framework
Led predictive modeling for user retention and monetization
Managed analytics across product, content, and business teams

experience.title: Director, Business Analytics & Intelligence
experience.description: Built business analytics function from scratch for sports organization. Created analytics infrastructure supporting business strategy across merchandising, content, and media.
highlights: Achieved 2x merchandise growth through pricing and inventory optimization
Established business intelligence infrastructure and reporting standards
Designed analytics-driven decision-making processes across business units

experience.title: VP, Analytics
experience.description: Led analytics for media company with 150M+ registered users, 800+ radio stations. Built analytics organization supporting product, content, and business strategy.
highlights: Pioneered first formal A/B testing program, establishing culture of evidence-based decision-making
Designed analytics infrastructure supporting real-time audience insights
Scaled analytics team from 1 to 6 people

experience.title: Director, Analytics & Insights
experience.description: Built analytics organization from zero for digital media company with 200M+ monthly visitors. Established analytics discipline and data-driven editorial decision-making.
highlights: Created analytics infrastructure supporting 500+ content editors
Led audience analytics and content performance analysis

experience.title: Senior Consultant
experience.description: Strategy and operations consulting for Fortune 500 and government clients.

experience.title: Senior Consultant
experience.description: Strategy and operations consulting across financial services, technology, and government sectors.

highlights.title: Platform-Scale Analytics Leadership
highlights.description: Built analytics organizations serving millions of users and billions in revenue across HuffPost (200M+ monthly visitors), iHeart Media (150M+ users), and Vimeo.

highlights.title: Experimentation Discipline Pioneer
highlights.description: Pioneered first formal A/B testing and causal inference programs at iHeart, establishing culture of evidence-based decision-making that persists today.

highlights.title: Zero-to-One Builder
highlights.description: Built analytics functions from scratch at 4+ organizations (HuffPost, iHeart, MLS, Edelman), scaling teams and establishing analytics as core business discipline.

highlights.title: Manager-of-Managers Leadership
highlights.description: Scaled and managed multi-level analytics organizations, from individual contributors to directors, across portfolio of business units and functions.
